form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 13th (20m 1) over 2500m at Reefton well beaten by Spirit Downunder (3:13.30) on March 8 at $48.70. Before that 11th (20m 1) over 2600m at Patterson Park, beaten 21 m by Bruntwood Brigade (3:19.10) on March 6 at $20.10. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Having his second run back from a spell. Solid effort when 2nd (10m 1) over 2700m at Gore Raceway beaten a neck by Beach Day (3:24.20) on March 19 at $3.80. Can find the frame again.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth behind Debbie Lincoln at Addington over 2600m in a FM on February 13 at $15.80. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Beach Day at Wyndham Raceway over 1609m in a 4yo+ M on March 29 at $2.70. Each way value.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 12th (40m 2) over 2750m at Gore well beaten by Wag Star (3:36.50) on February 15 at $4.30. Showed ability the race before when he posted a big 7 m win as favourite (40m 1) at Oamaru (3:55.70) beating Commander Ben in on February 1 at $4.30. One of the better chances.
